title: Expected/Result Type for Error Handling
description: Implement an Expected<T, E> type for error handling without exceptions, similar to Rust's Result or C++23 std::expected.
requirements: Template class must be named 'Expected<T, E>'
Store either value T or error E (not both)
Implement value() with exception on error state
Implement error() with exception on value state

few_shot_examples.prompt: Store value or error in union with tag.
